ddls:
CREATE TABLE "deals" (
  "deal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each M&A deal */,
  "target_seller" TEXT /* Name of the target bank */,
  "acquiring_bank" TEXT /* Name of the acquiring bank */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the target bank is located */,
  "industry_type" TEXT /* Industry type of the target bank */,
  "announce_date" TEXT /* Date when the deal was announced */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the deal */,
  "deal_value" REAL /* Value of the deal in millions of dollars */,
  "target_total_assets" INTEGER /* Total assets of the target bank in thousands of dollars */,
  "deal_type" TEXT /* Type of deal (e.g., cash, stock, mixed) */,
  "closing_date" TEXT /* Date when the deal was closed */,
  "deal_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the deal */,
  "source_of_funds" TEXT /* Source of funds for the deal (e.g., bank financing, equity) */,
  "deal_impact" TEXT /* Impact of the deal (e.g., market share, customer base) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deals_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES deal_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deals_state FOREIGN KEY ("state") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deals_acquiring_bank FOREIGN KEY ("acquiring_bank") REFERENCES banks ("bank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deals_target_seller FOREIGN KEY ("target_seller") REFERENCES banks ("bank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deals_industry_type FOREIGN KEY ("industry_type") REFERENCES industry_types ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "banks" (
  "bank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bank */,
  "bank_name" TEXT /* Name of the bank */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the bank is located */,
  "industry_type" TEXT /* Industry type of the bank */,
  "total_assets" INTEGER /* Total assets of the bank in thousands of dollars */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the bank was founded */,
  "ceo_name" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "board_members" TEXT /* List of board members */,
  "number_of_branches" INTEGER /* Number of branches */,
  "annual_revenue" REAL /* Annual revenue of the bank */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the state is in */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product of the state */,
  "major_cities" TEXT /* List of major cities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industry_types" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry type */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry type */,
  "market_share" REAL /* Market share of the industry type */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Annual growth rate of the industry type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deal_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deal status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the deal status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the deal status */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date when the status was last updated */,
  "status_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the current status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deal_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deal value entry */,
  "deal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the deal */,
  "value_date" TEXT /* Date when the value was recorded */,
  "deal_value" REAL /* Value of the deal in millions of dollars */,
  "value_source" TEXT /* Source of the value data (e.g., public records, internal estimates) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deal_values_deal_id FOREIGN KEY ("deal_id") REFERENCES deals ("deal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset entry */,
  "bank_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bank */,
  "asset_date" TEXT /* Date when the assets were recorded */,
  "total_assets" INTEGER /* Total assets of the bank in thousands of dollars */,
  "asset_source" TEXT /* Source of the asset data (e.g., annual reports, third-party audits) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assets_bank_id FOREIGN KEY ("bank_id") REFERENCES banks ("bank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, investor, compliance officer) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "deal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the deal the report is about */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., trend analysis, predictive modeling) */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "report_details" TEXT /* Detailed content of the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_deal_id FOREIGN KEY ("deal_id") REFERENCES deals ("deal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who should receive the alert */,
  "deal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the deal the alert is about */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was sent */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., new deal announced, deal completed) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message included in the alert */,
  "alert_priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the alert (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_deal_id FOREIGN KEY ("deal_id") REFERENCES deals ("deal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who owns the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the dashboard was last updated */,
  "dashboard_layout" TEXT /* Layout of the dashboard */,
  "widgets" TEXT /* List of widgets on the dashboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data export */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the export */,
  "deal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the deal the data is about */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was exported */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the exported data file */,
  "export_format" TEXT /* Format of the exported data (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  "export_size" TEXT /* Size of the exported file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exports_deal_id FOREIGN KEY ("deal_id") REFERENCES deals ("deal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filters" (
  "filter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each filter */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the filter */,
  "filter_name" TEXT /* Name of the filter */,
  "filter_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria used for filtering the data */,
  "filter_description" TEXT /* Description of the filter criteria */,
  "last_used" TEXT /* Date when the filter was last used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("filter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filters_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_permissions FOREIGN KEY ("permissions") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the permission was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)
